title: Counterfeit Detection Result (Counterfeit Vision -> Command Centre)
description: Output emitted by the Counterfeit Vision CV model (Adharshan) for a single note image. The command centre consumes this to render the note-scan card and feed the fusion LLM.

event_id.description: Unique id for this scanned note.

missing_features.description: Security features found absent/failed (feature-level detection). Powers the 'why fake' explanation.

image_ref.description: Path/URL to the captured note image for the UI.

heatmap_ref.description: Path/URL to the Grad-CAM heatmap overlay image — highlights which regions drove the fake/genuine decision.

location_hint.description: Optional seizure location for the crime map (cross-domain overlap).
